translations.en: a bizarre, two-headed beast. Both heads take turns speaking to you.
translations.zh: 奇異的雙頭獸。兩個頭輪流與汝說話。

translations.en: "Stand over here!"
translations.zh: 「站到這邊來！」

translations.en: "Stand over there!"
translations.zh: 「站到那邊去！」

translations.en: "Come hear our @puzzle anywhere!"
translations.zh: 「來吧，無論在哪兒都可聆聽我們的@謎題！」

translations.en: "Should I answer you today? If asked tomorrow, I would say..."
translations.zh: 「今日我該回答汝嗎？若是明日相問，我會說……」

translations.en: "That my partner and I are the @Pushme @Pullyu, and speaking in @riddles is what we do."
translations.zh: 「我與同伴乃是@推牠@拉牠，以@謎語說話乃吾等之道。」

translations.en: "But which is @Pullyu, and which is @Pushme? If you'd asked yesterday, I'd have told thee!"
translations.zh: 「但哪個是@拉牠，哪個是@推牠？若昨日相問，我本會告訴汝！」

translations.en: "If you asked my partner, thinking him wise, he'd tell you the Pushme always @lies!"
translations.zh: 「若汝去問我的同伴，以為他聰明，他會告訴汝推牠總是說@謊！」

translations.en: "If you asked my partner, then forsooth, he'd say the Pullyu always speaks @truth!"
translations.zh: 「若汝去問我的同伴，確實，他會說拉牠說的總是@真話！」

translations.en: "My partner lies, and that is true. It is because he's the @Pullyu!"
translations.zh: 「我的同伴說謊，此為真言。因為他是@拉牠！」

translations.en: "I'll always tell the truth to thee. That's because I am the @Pushme!"
translations.zh: 「吾對汝永遠說真話。那是因為吾是@推牠！」

translations.en: "If my partner said you should go @west, then he would be a lying pest!"
translations.zh: 「若我的同伴說汝該往@西走，那他就是個說謊的討厭鬼！」

translations.en: "If my partner said you should go @east, then he would be a lying beast!"
translations.zh: 「若我的同伴說汝該往@東走，那他就是個說謊的畜生！」

translations.en: "If my partner said 'Go @east.' to you, then he'd have said that which is true."
translations.zh: 「若我的同伴對汝說『往@東走』，那他說的便是真話。」

translations.en: "If my partner said to you 'Go @west.', then his advice would be the best."
translations.zh: 「若我的同伴對汝說『往@西走』，那他的忠告才是最佳之策。」

translations.en: "If you asked my partner which was best, he'd say 'East lie beasts, so go quest west.'"
translations.zh: 「若汝問我的同伴哪條路最佳，他會說『東有猛獸，西行探險去』。」

translations.en: "So soon to leave?"
translations.zh: 「這麼快就要離開？」

translations.en: "You'd leave so soon?"
translations.zh: 「汝要這麼快就走？」

translations.en: "Take three blind mice, a dish and spoon!"
translations.zh: 「帶上三隻盲鼠，一只碟和一把匙！」

translations.en: "And if, perhaps, you've solved our riddle,"
translations.zh: 「而若汝已解開吾等謎題，」

translations.en: "Then go dance with the cat and fiddle!"
translations.zh: 「便去與貓和提琴共舞吧！」

translations.en: Both heads smile innocently at you.
translations.zh: 兩個頭都無辜地對汝微笑。

translations.en: Dupre is staring at them, his jaw hanging wide open.
translations.zh: 杜普雷目瞪口呆地盯著牠們。

translations.en: Iolo says "That's got to be the most baffling thing I've ever heard."
translations.zh: 伊歐羅說：「這必是我這輩子聽過最令人費解的事了。」

translations.en: "Is that a @lie, or is it @true?"
translations.zh: 「那是@謊言，還是@真話？」

translations.en: "Could we be more confused than you?"
translations.zh: 「我們能比汝更困惑嗎？」

translator_notes: 推牠-拉牠雙頭獸說話充滿悖論謎語。謹慎處理時態、謊言/真話邏輯。童謠典故（三隻盲鼠）保留趣味感。
